---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behavior
title: "fix: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, console output, or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17 |
| Node.js | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| Trexo version / commit | e.g. `main` @ `abc1234` |

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — related issues, recent changes, etc.
